ValidationRule.description: Cannot create SFDC Accounts in SFDC - Need to create them ion EBX via integration.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( (ISBLANK(MDM_Status__c)) ,$Profile.Name <> "PROFILE: Integration" ,$Profile.Name <> "Application Integration profiles" ,$Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" ,$Profile.Name <> "PerkinElmer Profile" /*eComm Guest Profile*/ ,$Profile.Id <> "00e3A000001te7I" /*SVMX PS tech Support*/ ,$Profile.Id <> "00e30000000eVmD" /*CA10 - Customer Care*/ ,$Profile.Id <> "00e30000000smyd" /*DAS APAC Sales*/ ,$Profile.Id <> "00e30000000sGkU" /*EH EMEA Sales*/ ,$Profile.Id <> "00e30000001yEQ8" /*LST EMEA Sales*/ ,$Profile.Id <> "00e3A000000jUtJ" /*OneSource APAC Sales*/ ,$Profile.Id <> "00e3A000000jV71" /*OneSource EMEA Sales*/ ,$Profile.Id <> "00e30000001Z0gp" /*LST Sales Service/Hybrid*/ ,$Profile.Id <> "00e3A000001te1n" /*SDX-APAC-Sales-Standard*/ ,$Profile.Id <> "00e3A000001qT2s" /*SDX-EMEA-Sales-Standard*/ ,$Profile.Id <> "00e3A000001te1T" /*SDX-Sales-Standard EMEA L2*/ ,$Profile.Name <> "LDR Demand Gen" ,$Profile.Name <> "Informatics Sales" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_ACCOUNT_009: Creating a new SFDC Account requires using the 'New Account' button from your pinned Accounts List View from the Accounts Tab
